description:
GIVEN a user is on the Settings page
AND the user has selected 'Dev Settings'

steps.action: WHEN a user selects different Environment Settings
steps.result:
THEN the app loads and functions as expected
AND the appropriate environment data is displayed based upon config settings
THEN the app will reload and display the words *dev* in the {color:#bf2600}*RED*{color} Header, next to the left nav buttons in the header (Home, Games, MASN, SNLA, etc.)
THEN the app will reload and display the words *qa* in the {color:#4c9aff}*Blue*{color} Header, next to the left nav buttons in the header (Home, Games, MASN, SNLA, etc.)
THEN the app will reload and display the words *stage* in the {color:#ff5630}*ORANGE*{color} Header, next to the left nav buttons in the header (Home, Games, MASN, SNLA, etc.)
THEN the app will reload and display the words *mock* in the {color:#36b37e}*GREEN*{color} Header, next to the left nav buttons in the header (Home, Games, MASN, SNLA, etc.)
THEN the app will reload and the user will see our normal transparent *BLACK* Header. The words *prod will not be displayed* next to the left nav buttons in the header (Home, Games, MASN, SNLA, etc.)
